customConcepts.name: Profile
customConcepts.spec:
**concept** Profile [User]

**purpose** manage user biographical information and public appearance

**principle** If a user updates their profile details, such as their bio or picture, these changes are reflected whenever the user is viewed.

**state**
  users set of User with
    bio: String
    profilePicture: String
    email: String

**actions**
  updateProfile (user: User, bio: String, profilePicture: String, email: String)
    **requires** user is registered
    **effects** user.bio := bio, user.profilePicture := profilePicture, user.email := email

customConcepts.name: Posting
customConcepts.spec:
**concept** Posting [Author]

**purpose** allow authors to publish media content for others to view

**principle** If an author creates a post with media and a caption, it becomes available for retrieval and display.

**state**
  posts set of Post with
    author: Author
    mediaUrl: String
    caption: String
    timestamp: Number

**actions**
  create (author: Author, mediaUrl: String, caption: String): Post
    **requires** mediaUrl is valid
    **effects** create new p in posts with author, mediaUrl, caption, timestamp := current_time

  delete (post: Post)
    **requires** post exists
    **effects** remove post from posts

customConcepts.name: Following
customConcepts.spec:
**concept** Following [Follower, Followee]

**purpose** model a directed social graph where users subscribe to others' updates

**principle** If user A follows user B, then A is listed as a follower of B, and B is listed as being followed by A.

**state**
  follows set of Follow with
    follower: Follower
    followee: Followee

**actions**
  follow (follower: Follower, followee: Followee)
    **requires** follower != followee
    **effects** create f in follows with follower, followee

  unfollow (follower: Follower, followee: Followee)
    **requires** exists f in follows with follower, followee
    **effects** remove f from follows

customConcepts.name: Commenting
customConcepts.spec:
**concept** Commenting [Author, Item]

**purpose** allow users to discuss or annotate items

**principle** If an author adds a comment to an item, that text is persistently associated with the item.

**state**
  comments set of Comment with
    author: Author
    item: Item
    text: String
    timestamp: Number

**actions**
  comment (author: Author, item: Item, text: String): Comment
    **requires** text is not empty
    **effects** create c in comments with author, item, text, timestamp := current_time

  delete (comment: Comment)
    **requires** comment exists
    **effects** remove comment from comments

customConcepts.name: Messaging
customConcepts.spec:
**concept** Messaging [Sender, Receiver]

**purpose** enable private, direct communication between users

**principle** If a sender sends a message to a receiver, the message is delivered to the receiver's inbox.

**state**
  messages set of Message with
    sender: Sender
    receiver: Receiver
    text: String
    timestamp: Number

**actions**
  send (sender: Sender, receiver: Receiver, text: String): Message
    **requires** text is not empty
    **effects** create m in messages with sender, receiver, text, timestamp := current_time

customConcepts.name: Notification
customConcepts.spec:
**concept** Notification [User]

**purpose** alert users to relevant events and activities

**principle** If an event triggers a notification for a user, it is stored until the user acknowledges it.

**state**
  notifications set of Notification with
    user: User
    message: String
    isRead: Boolean
    timestamp: Number

**actions**
  notify (user: User, message: String)
    **effects** create n in notifications with user, message, isRead := false, timestamp := current_time

  markRead (notification: Notification)
    **requires** notification in notifications
    **effects** notification.isRead := true
